description_long: This house features a Mediterranean-inspired design with light-colored stucco walls and a series of red-tiled gable roofs. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, including a main two-story section and several single-story wings, one of which appears to function as a garage with a gray roof. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with rectangular and arched shapes, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small overhang and a paved walkway. The property sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, and a cylindrical object, possibly a water barrel or utility feature, is visible near one corner. The exterior is finished with a combination of smooth and slightly textured surfaces, and the overall layout suggests a spacious, family-oriented residence. The house is designed to be approachable from a paved driveway and features multiple access points.
description: A Mediterranean-style house with red-tiled gable roofs, light stucco walls, and a mix of single and two-story sections, including a garage and multiple window arrangements. The property sits on a green lawn with a paved entryway and a small utility barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two-story section, garage with gray roof, and a small utility barrel on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage, and the rear of the single-story wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, paved area, and the arrangement of the gable roofs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the end of the single-story wing and a small window, with the utility barrel visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of rectangular and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small overhang, paved walkway, and minimal decorative elements
